data.body: Decomposed epic adept-hedge-stain (now the Jira-reconciler-correctness umbrella) into 8 children. Band A store: A1 tricolour-head-ratfish (.retired rename, I1), A2 glandulous-potent-waxwing (RC2b horizon-safe; carries the OPEN durability decision), A3 entitled-unsweet-nutria (live-store remediation to zero fsck). Band B convergence: B1 lofty-beech-twang (Phase-3 baseline consumer swap; existing, re-parented; operator/live-ops). Band C latent: C1 feline-wandering-dassierat (silent-clobber conflict signal), C2 lowerclass-creased-fruitbat (hard-delete re-create; existing, re-parented OUT of Janitor epic), C3 nonglacial-tense-vulture (field-allowlist-drop alert), C4 lambswool-shaded-eider (bulk-path 429 Retry-After parity). Deps: A2->A1, A3->A2, A3->A1 depends_on; C1 relates_to B1. Risk #5 (single-hop transitions) accepted/out-of-scope. All 6 new children pass check-ac + clarity. A2 is the only child gated on a design decision.
